zh.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde是Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard和Aveline的兒子，於0985年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯隆維爾。他於大約1070年與Bertha de Brimesfield在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德結婚。他去世於1090年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德享年105歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde是Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard和Aveline的儿子，于0985年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯隆維爾。他于大约1070年与Bertha de Brimesfield在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德结婚。他去世于1090年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德享年105岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Osbern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

en.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde was born in 0985, in Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France as the son of Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard and Aveline. He married Bertha de Brimesfield about 1070, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1090, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 105, and was buried in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde est né en 0985, à Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, fils de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard et Aveline. Il a épousé Bertha de Brimesfield environ 1070, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1090, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 105 ans, et a été enterré à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde wurde 0985 in Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich, als Sohn von Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard und Aveline geboren. Er hat um 1070 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Bertha de Brimesfield geheiratet. Er starb 1090 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde è nato il nel 0985 nel Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia come figlio di Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard e Aveline. Lui sposato Bertha de Brimesfield circa 1070, nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1090, nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 105 anni, e fu sepolto a Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfeldeは0985年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロングエヴィルでSir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-GiffardとAvelineの息子として生まれた。約1070年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドでBertha de Brimesfieldと結婚した。彼は1090年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで105歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde(은)는 0985년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 론구에빌에서 Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard(와)과 Aveline의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1070년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 Bertha de Brimesfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 105세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde nasceu em 0985, em Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França filho de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard e Aveline. Ele casou-se com Bertha de Brimesfield aproximadamente 1070, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1090, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 105 anos, e foi sepultado em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde родился в 0985 г. в местности лонгуевилл, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. Его родителей звали Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard и Aveline. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha de Brimesfield около 1070 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1090 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 105 лет и был похоронен в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Osbern Giffard d'Arques, Seigneur de Brimesfelde nació en 0985, en Longueville, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia como hijo de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard y Aveline. Se casó con Bertha de Brimesfield aproximadamente 1070, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1090, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 105 años, y fue sepultado en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
